---
title: "Applied Computational Analysis"
author: "Maggie Zhang"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  bookdown::gitbook:
    config:
      mathjax: "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mathjax@3/es5/tex-mml-chtml.js"
bibliography: refs.bib
link-citations: true
---

# Applied Computational Analysis Course Notes

This site contains my course notes for Applied Computational Analysis. The notes are organized by lecture and cover topics in numerical methods, computational mathematics, and their applications.

---

## Table of Contents

- [Lecture 1](#lecture1)
- [Lecture 2](#lecture2)
- [Lecture 3](#lecture3)
- [Lecture 4](#lecture4)
- [Lecture 5](#lecture5)
- [Lecture 6](#lecture6)
- [Bibliography](#refs)

---
